subject: Potential explanations for resolution not improving
body:
Hi all,

I wondered if anyone might have any suggestions for when resolution doesn't 
improve in M for a particle that I know should improve. In other datasets 
(with the same particle) M has substantially improved my resolution, but in 
a new dataset it's only made extremely small improvements: less than 1 A 
difference with poses, image warp, volume warp and tilt angles turned on.

I seem to be stuck around 13.5 A. I have some things I'll be trying, but I 
wondered if anyone has any ideas about limiting factors that could be 
stopping M from improving my resolution?


Best,
Joe.
